name: LogicMonitor
description: LogicMonitor — SaaS infrastructure monitoring for on-prem, cloud, and hybrid environments with AIOps-powered alerting.

seo.title: LogicMonitor — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: LogicMonitor: LogicMonitor — SaaS infrastructure monitoring for on-prem, cloud, and hybrid environments with AIOps-powered alerting.

when_to_use: AIOps-powered alerting for hybrid cloud infrastructure
Auto-discover on-prem and cloud resources for monitoring
Predictive alerts before capacity thresholds are breached
SaaS monitoring covering network, servers, and cloud

pros: Strong hybrid and on-prem infrastructure monitoring
Thousands of prebuilt integrations and templates
Mature enterprise support and professional services
cons: UI feels dated compared to newer SaaS APM tools
Pricing aimed at mid-market and enterprise only
APM and tracing depth lags Datadog and Dynatrace
Agent sprawl can complicate large deployments
review.verdict: Reliable pick for hybrid infra monitoring in traditional shops; cloud-native startups will likely prefer a newer platform.
review.best_for: Enterprises with mixed on-prem, VM, and cloud workloads
review.not_for: Cloud-native startups focused on deep distributed tracing
